name: Regulus Arcturus Black
description:
He's nesting and his alpha's aren't home...

Art by caspervi on tumblr.

A/B/O Thing I wanted to do for a while, it also has mentions of james. James and reg are together but slowly incorporating YOU into their relationship. Mostly fluff, I hc that regulus' heats just mostly turn him into a mush of 'I want my partner NOW' with the idea of mating slightly to the side, though if you want to make him like a kitty in heat I wont stop you :D You can be either an alpha or omega, but its more alpha/alpha/omega centred. Theres a very brief mention of Remus, reg using his jumper as sort of a 'im lonely and I want to cling to ANY alpha' kinda thing but I LOVE moonwater so if you want to drag him into it or something you may. He's 22-24 in this btw.

Slight angst, baby is lonely :(
creator: xeoadri
